equipmentMods.amulet: For every 30 points of your highest stat, gain 1% Damage bonus.
equipmentMods.belt: Death Blade: Extend the duration Death Blade stays on the field by 2 seconds.
equipmentMods.goblet: Arcane Apocalypse: Increase explosion size by 30%. When an explosion hits, 25% chance to gain 2% Arcane damage buff, stacks up to 75.
equipmentMods.horn: Arcane Apocalypse: Arcane Apocalypse gains a 50% chance to explode a second time, and a 25% to explode a third time.
equipmentMods.relic: Gain an 8% chance to spawn Mecha Golems, dealing Fire Damage infront of them for 6 seconds. Mecha Golems benefit from your Fire Damage bonus
equipmentMods.trinket: Death Blade: When Death Blade despawns, it will summon an arcane spike on a nearby enemy, dealing 100% damage + 20% additional damage for every second the blade was on the field.
equipmentMods.boots: Gain 1% maximum Health per potion slot

equipmentMods.belt: Lightning Totems: Totems range grows by 40%. Totems deal an additional 10% damage for every totem in its range.
equipmentMods.goblet: Static Charge: Static charge will now stay for an additional 0.6 seconds, damaging more enemies and dealing an addition 5% per enemy inside Static Charge range.
equipmentMods.horn: Static Charge: Gain charges by damaging foes. Each charge adds 1% lightning damage. At 100 charges, summon thunderbolts across the battlefield.
equipmentMods.trinket: Static Charge: Static charge will now stay for an additional 0.6 seconds, damaging more enemies and dealing an addition 5% per enemy inside Static Charge range.

equipmentMods.goblet: Carnage of Fire: Now spawns on enemies. When the fire hits the ground, spawn a flaming spike that gains a 85% damage bonus.
Burning Shield: The Shield will stay an additional 2 seconds. When the shield dissipates, it triggers a Fire explosion dealing 500% base damage + 25% more damage based on the shield radius.

equipmentMods.trinket: Burning Shield: Burning shield becomes a legendary fire shield, increasing its size by 10% and damage by 30% and grants a Blessing that gives 1% Fire Damage and 1% Armor, stacks up to 75.

equipmentMods.goblet: Dragon Flame: Increase radius of fire breath area by 40%, and 33% chance to deal Triple Damage.
Arcane Totems: Your totems fire two additional arcane flames.
Lightning Totems: Totems stay for an additional 0.6 seconds and have a 50% chance to pulse with electricity when struck by lightning, dealing 150% damage.
Fire Beam: Gain three additional beams.
Death Blade: When Death Blade despawns, it will summon an arcane spike on a nearby enemy, dealing 100% damage + 20% additional damage for every second the blade was on the field.
Burning Shield: Burning shield becomes a legendary fire shield, increasing its size by 10% and damage by 30% and grants a Blessing that gives 1% Fire Damage and 1% Armor, stacks up to 75.
Arcane Orbs: Fire two additional orbs.
Spinning Blade: Shoots a shuriken from each blade, dealing 25% damage. For each shuriken, the spinning blades get 15% additional damage.
Lightning Plasma: Lightning Plasma stays for an additional 0.75 seconds and deals +55% damage.

Arcane Orb: Orbs become Chaos orbs, dealing 40% increased damage. Chaos Orbs gain 15% increased damage for every additional orb. Chaos orbs have a 10% chance to cause an Arcane burst when returning to the player.
Rain of Flames: Meteors now explode, gaining 85% more damage.
Rain of Flames: Fire an two additional meteors.
